description: Lock the 2026-06-27 coin_die_engraving correction to hand-engraved dies and punches for struck coinage, not coin-blank casting, cast coinage traditions, or later milled/hubbed coin manufacture.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to early Lydian/Ionian electrum coinage around 650 BCE.
Official mint and assay context supplies authorization, regulated weights, and quality-control context for marks struck from dies.
The corrected material/tooling edge represents carved metal dies rather than molds for casting coin blanks.
Strict weight-standard coinage makes weighing a direct quality-control context for struck coin production.
Bronze casting molds are broader blank-casting or cast-object technology and should not be restored to this struck-die engraving node.
